description_long: This object is a stylized flower with four broad, heart-shaped green petals radiating symmetrically from a central disk. The petals have a gradient of lighter green toward the center and darker green at the edges, giving a natural variegated appearance. At the center, there is a prominent, rounded cluster of small, purple-tipped filaments, resembling a composite flower head. The flower is attached to a single, slightly curved green stem that is smooth and cylindrical. The back of the petals is a uniform darker green, and no distinct leaves are visible apart from the petal-like structures. The overall form is simple yet visually striking, with a clear radial symmetry and a soft, organic texture.
description: A four-petaled, heart-shaped green flower with a purple-tipped central disk and a single smooth green stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four heart-shaped green petals and the purple-tipped central disk clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the petals and the protruding central disk, with the stem curving backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform dark green color of the petal backs and the full length of the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the petals and the central disk, with the stem curving forward.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, evenly spaced around the central disk, with slight overlapping at the base and clear radial symmetry.
